title: Garlicky Crumbly Kenyan Cheddar Salad
description: A vibrant, FODMAP-friendly salad featuring rocket, cheddar crumble, pickled cucumbers, toasted almonds, and a garlicky dressing that delivers a crowd-pleasing crunch.

ingredients.name: toasted almonds
ingredients.notes: dry‑toast in a pan until golden

ingredients.name: garlic‑infused olive oil
ingredients.notes: infuse with 1 minced garlic clove then strain

instructions: Heat a dry skillet over medium heat (180 °C). Add the almonds and toast for 2–3 minutes, stirring occasionally until golden. Remove from heat and set aside to cool.
In a small bowl, whisk together the garlic‑infused olive oil, apple cider vinegar, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes (if using) until the dressing is emulsified.
Place the rocket in a large salad bowl. Sprinkle the cheddar crumble and add the pickled cucumber slices.
Pour the dressing over the salad and gently toss to coat all ingredients evenly.
Add the toasted almonds and give a final gentle toss to combine.
Serve immediately, optionally garnish with extra cheddar or almonds for added crunch.
Enjoy the garlicky, crumbly, and crowd‑pleasing flavors of this Kenyan-inspired salad!
